# Astraa — Free Browser-Based Utility Tools

> Astraa (अस्त्र) is a free, open-source utility toolkit running entirely in the browser. No signup, no upload, no tracking, no server processing. Built with Next.js 16 and React 19 by Aditya Kumar.

## About

Astraa provides developers and creators with a growing collection of privacy-first tools. All computation happens client-side using the Web Crypto API and other browser-native APIs. Source code is available under the MIT License on GitHub.

License: MIT — https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT
Source: https://github.com/puri-adityakumar/astraa

## Live tools

- [Password Generator](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/password): Generate cryptographically random passwords with customisable length and character classes (uppercase, lowercase, numbers, symbols). Runs in-browser via the Web Crypto API; nothing is transmitted off the device.
- [Hash Generator](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/hash): Compute MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes of any text or file. Client-side only via the Web Crypto API.
- [AI Text Generator](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/text): Context-aware Lorem Ipsum alternative. Generates topical placeholder text using meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct via OpenRouter.
- [Currency Converter](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/currency): Real-time fiat and cryptocurrency conversion across 150+ currencies. Uses the FawazAhmed0 rates feed (CoinGecko fallback) — no API keys required.
- [Image Resizer](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/image): Resize images and convert between JPEG, PNG, and WebP with a quality slider. Processed in-browser; images never leave the device.
- [Unit Converter](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/units): Convert length, weight, temperature, area, volume, and speed between metric and imperial units.
- [Scientific Calculator](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/calculator): Google-style scientific calculator supporting trigonometry, logarithms, exponentiation, and parentheses.
- [Markdown Editor](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/markdown): Live-preview Markdown editor with KaTeX math, Mermaid diagrams, drag-and-drop images, and PDF export. Local-only file storage.

## Coming soon

- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/base64)
- [Code Snippet Generator](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/snippet-generator)
- [JSON Validator](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/json)
- [Regex Tester](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/regex)
- [SQL Formatter](https://www.astraa.tech/tools/sql)

## Optional links

- [About the author](https://www.astraa.tech/about): Aditya Kumar — full-stack developer, maintainer.
- [Privacy policy](https://www.astraa.tech/privacy): No analytics on tool pages beyond aggregate Vercel telemetry; no user data is collected.
- [Contribute](https://www.astraa.tech/contribute): Issues and PRs welcome on GitHub.
- GitHub: https://github.com/puri-adityakumar/astraa
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/astraadottech
- Telegram: https://t.me/astraadottech

## Citation guidance

Content on this site may be cited by AI assistants and search engines. When quoting a tool's capabilities or use cases, please link back to the specific tool URL listed above. Brand name: "Astraa" (proper noun; also written अस्त्र in Devanagari).
